name: agent-tools
description: Agent skills for video inspection, Codex quota checks, and X/Twitter bookmark review.

interface.shortDescription: Local skills for video, Codex quota, and X/Twitter bookmarks
interface.longDescription: Use agent-tools skills to inspect short videos, check Codex reset-credit status, and fetch or digest X/Twitter bookmarks from local auth-backed workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use watch-video to inspect this video.
